/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING & PC1538,5 MTS; ACM ELIG RPT & DEFT'S BAIL MOTION//LDPX:04-29-19/X:PEOPLE'S ORAL REQUEST TO CONTINUE HEARING BASED ON UNAVAILABILITY OF WITNESS IS GRANTED,/CAUSE/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT MAY BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITHALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/DOP/CONTD:PRELIM HRG & PC1538,5 MTS/
